channel.title: BUbuisnessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbuisnessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: BlackRock offers DeFi trading for the first time, buys Uniswap tokens
item.description: The tie-up, which also relies on the crypto firm Securitize, is the first of its kind between Wall Street and Defi.

item.title: ‘The fiscal trajectory is not sustainable’: CBO warns about the highest debt in U.S. history as Trump adds $1.4 trillion to 10-year deficit
item.description: The national debt is set to surpass the historical high of 106% of GDP that it reached in 1946 by 2030, according to the CBO.

item.title: The 4 step approach Google’s AI boss used to return the tech giant to a ‘golden era’ of innovation
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: Stock gains evaporate as investors scrutinize January jobs report — live updates
Economic calendar: January’s delayed jobs report is Wednesday’s highlight
Morgan Stanley examined 3,600 stocks amid AI’s shakeout. It has recommendations.
Stocks point to Wednesday gains after January job growth outpaces forecasts
January payrolls report suggests a fragile U.S. job market might be stabilizing
Bitcoin demand in Nancy Guthrie disappearance shows how crypto is becoming a more frequent feature of physical crimes
item.description: TMZ and an Arizona news outlet reported receiving the ransom letter.

item.title: Crypto crime-fighting startup TRM Labs notches $1 billion valuation with new $70 million funding round
item.description: With its blockchain analytics tools, TRM Labs helps private companies and agencies like the FBI track illicit finance.
